content:
Your prewriting must be substantive, meaning you have shown you have seriously considered all aspects of your topic and labeled the technique (freewriting, mapping/clustering, brainstorming/listing, or questioning) you used. 
Use the ENG101 - Narrative Essay - Prewriting Worksheet ENG101 - Narrative Essay – Prewriting Worksheet 
Download ENG101 - Narrative Essay – Prewriting Worksheet
 to complete and submit this assignment.

Estimated Time for Completion
The estimated time to complete this activity is 3 - 4 hours.

Completion
  1. Use the proper naming convention when saving your assignment. The naming convention is ENG101_wk1_assn_firstintiallastname_date—for example, ENG101_wk1_assn_jsmith_mmddyyyy.
  2. Submit the Week 1 Assignment by the end of the week. See the video below to review the process.



After you submit your assignment, click Next to take the Week 1 Quiz.
Points
100
Submitting
a text entry box, a media recording, or a file upload
